title: Acronia giraldoi
taxonomy: Acronia giraldoi is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The genus Acronia is a part of the tribe Psychotrieae within the Rubiaceae family. Acronia giraldoi belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. It further belongs to the class Magnoliopsida and the order Gentianales. At the most specific level, it falls under the family Rubiaceae.
